metadata.author: Drew
metadata.title: You're Not Going to Believe This

story-1.title: The Five-Year-Old in the Dark
story-1.preview: I woke up screaming in a hospital room, fresh out of a three-day coma.

story-2.title: The Boy Who Was Never Wanted
story-2.preview: My father, Walter Weselak, bailed when my mother was pregnant.

story-3.title: The Foster Home and the Ukrainian Smell
story-3.preview: When Mom was in the hospital, I was placed in foster care with a Ukrainian family.

story-4.title: Flubber and the Rodeo Fuck
story-4.preview: We called him Flubber. Big, fat, three hundred pound grifter.

story-5.title: The Bass Player's Education
story-5.preview: Music saved me. Got an Erector Set at nineteen.

story-6.title: Weather Mojo and the Universe
story-6.preview: When I take a nap, a lunch break, wait for a bus—the rain comes.

story-7.title: The Witch's Tree
story-7.preview: In 1972, I was living on the street in Winnipeg. There was this tree...

story-8.title: Shadow So Low
story-8.preview: Somewhere between awake and fallen asleep, I'd find myself visited by a large male black shadow.

story-9.title: Debbie and the Chain Letter
story-9.preview: Met this excruciatingly beautiful blonde in Innisfail, Alberta—Debbie Lee Gulbransden.

story-10.title: The Woman Who Could Read Minds
story-10.preview: One day in Brandon, I was sitting with a couple of friends and announced I could read their minds.

story-11.title: Teaser and the Bewitched
story-11.preview: For a year and a half, 1984-85, I was involved in a band with a woman songwriter we called Teaser.

story-12.title: First UFO WTF
story-12.preview: About 1:AM on a beautiful summer night in the early 1980s. Walking home from a gathering, feeling great.

story-13.title: The Second UFO-OMG
story-13.preview: Summer of 1985. In a state of emotional anarchy, breaking up with Teaser.

story-14.title: Mountain Mama of Copacabana
story-14.preview: Lake Titicaca: A place of legends. To the north and east of Copacabana, Bolivia...

story-15.title: Rickie Lee Rescue
story-15.preview: July 21, 2015—had to be one of the worst days of my life. Subletter got me evicted.

story-16.title: The Patrol by Puppy
story-16.preview: Not sleeping well and altitude is creating havoc. This puppy ain't feeln' so well.

story-17.title: The Disappearing Juan Carlos
story-17.preview: Happened upon a restaurant a couple of miles up the valley, outside of Pisac.

story-18.title: Gurus Are Us
story-18.preview: High up in the Andes of Peru lies the Urubamba valley at 2,972 meters ASL.

story-19.title: The Time Shift at Ñaupa
story-19.preview: Iglesia de Ñaupa—energy gate at an archaeological site along the train tracks.

story-20.title: I Am the Angel
story-20.preview: Just as Shawna pointed out to me, I seem to change people's lives without being aware.

story-21.title: The Birth of This Book
story-21.preview: It was May 7th, 2025, and I was taking part in a healing circle of sorts...

story-22.title: The Gift
story-22.preview: What I've learned through all of this is that I'm not a devoted religious person...
